evals.prompt: I need to find 20 US fitness creators on YouTube who focus on home workouts. They should have at least 50k subscribers and decent engagement.
evals.expected_output: Run search directly with inferred parameters and present a readable shortlist
expectations: Infers platform=YOUTUBE, regions=US, min-subscribers=50000
Runs easykol search directly without asking for clarification
Presents a readable list (not raw JSON) with name, handle, followers, avg performance
Does NOT run easykol parse before search

evals.prompt: Help me find some influencers for our new skincare brand.
evals.expected_output: Request is underspecified — ask for platform and region before searching
expectations: Does NOT execute a search before getting clarification
Asks about platform (YouTube, TikTok, or Instagram)
Asks about target region or country
Asks at most one or two things, not a full parameter form

evals.prompt: 我要找一些做美食的 Instagram 博主，主要投中国大陆市场，粉丝 10 万以上的，帮我找 15 个
evals.expected_output: Extract parameters from Chinese input and search directly
expectations: Infers platform=INSTAGRAM
Infers regions=CN
Infers min-subscribers=100000
Infers limit=15
Runs easykol search directly without asking for clarification

evals.prompt: Find me TikTok creators similar to this channel: https://www.tiktok.com/@charlidamelio
evals.expected_output: Use easykol similar with the provided URL, not a text-based search
expectations: Runs easykol similar --url https://www.tiktok.com/@charlidamelio
Does NOT run easykol search instead
Tells the user this may take ~30s before starting
Presents results as a readable shortlist

evals.prompt: Find YouTube channels similar to https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCo3m9supEHL8z2nTQaIBs6g but only in US and UK, at least 50k subscribers.
evals.expected_output: Use easykol similar with URL and region/follower filters
expectations: Runs easykol similar --url ... --regions US,GB --min-subscribers 50000
Does NOT run easykol search instead
Applies the region and follower filters as CLI flags

evals.prompt: What can you tell me about this creator? https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCo3m9supEHL8z2nTQaIBs6g
evals.expected_output: Run easykol kol with the URL and present the profile
expectations: Runs easykol kol --url https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCo3m9supEHL8z2nTQaIBs6g
Does NOT run easykol search to find this creator
Reports nickname, follower count, avg performance, language, and email if available
Notes that YouTube creators do not have a region field if relevant

evals.prompt: I want to know the audience breakdown for this YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCo3m9supEHL8z2nTQaIBs6g — especially what countries they're from and the age/gender split.
evals.expected_output: Run easykol audience and interpret the results
expectations: Runs easykol audience --url https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCo3m9supEHL8z2nTQaIBs6g
Reports age distribution, gender split, and top audience countries
Includes T1/T2/T3 development level context for regions
Does NOT run easykol kol or easykol search instead

evals.prompt: 这个博主的虚假粉丝率高吗？https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCo3m9supEHL8z2nTQaIBs6g
evals.expected_output: Run easykol audience and interpret the suspectedFakeRate field
expectations: Runs easykol audience --url ... to get fakeFollowers data
Interprets suspectedFakeRate: flags >20% as worth noting, >40% as a red flag
Does not just dump the number — explains what it means

evals.prompt: I found this creator during a search. Can you pull their profile AND check their audience quality? https://www.instagram.com/someinfluencer/
evals.expected_output: Run both easykol kol and easykol audience, combine the results
expectations: Runs easykol kol --url ... for the profile
Runs easykol audience --url ... for the audience breakdown
Presents both sets of results coherently, not as two separate dumps

evals.prompt: I have a list of YouTube and TikTok creators I want to contact. Can you get their emails? YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCo3m9supEHL8z2nTQaIBs6g, TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@someuser
evals.expected_output: Run easykol emails with mixed platform flags and share the download URL
expectations: Runs easykol emails --yt-urls <yt_url> --tt-urls <tt_url>
Tells the user this is async and may take ~60s
Returns the downloadUrl from the result
Does NOT run easykol kol for each URL individually instead

evals.prompt: 批量导出这10个 Instagram 博主的邮箱：https://www.instagram.com/user1/, https://www.instagram.com/user2/, ...
evals.expected_output: Run easykol emails --ins-urls with all URLs, report cost and download link
expectations: Runs easykol emails --ins-urls <comma-separated-urls>
Notes that 10 URLs will cost 2 quota (1 per 5, rounded up)
Reports the downloadUrl when the task completes

evals.prompt: What are the stats on this video? https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
evals.expected_output: Run easykol video with the URL and present the stats
expectations: Runs easykol video --url https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
Reports title, view count, like count, publish date, author name and follower count
Does NOT run easykol kol or easykol search instead

evals.prompt: 分析一下这个 TikTok 视频的数据：https://www.tiktok.com/@someuser/video/12345678
evals.expected_output: Run easykol video for the TikTok URL
expectations: Runs easykol video --url https://www.tiktok.com/@someuser/video/12345678
Reports the available stats (views, likes, author info)
Does NOT claim this URL is unsupported

evals.prompt: I just signed up for EasyKOL and want to get started. My API key is ek_live_abc123def456 and my email is user@example.com.
evals.expected_output: Configure the key securely using --key-stdin, never as a visible argument
expectations: Uses printf '%s' '<KEY>' | easykol auth --key-stdin --email <email>
Does NOT pass the key as --key ek_live_abc123... on the command line
Confirms setup by running easykol doctor afterwards
Does NOT echo or log the key in output to the user

evals.prompt: How do I get started with EasyKOL? I don't have an account yet.
evals.expected_output: Guide through onboarding without exposing CLI commands to the user
expectations: Does NOT expose raw CLI commands to the user
Explains they need an API key from the EasyKOL dashboard
Offers to configure the CLI once they have the key
Does not run any CLI commands until auth is available

evals.prompt: My search failed — it said something about quota being exhausted. How do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Run quota silently, explain the situation, share top-up URL from action field
expectations: Runs easykol quota itself (does not tell user to run it)
Reports remaining credits clearly
Shares action.url from the CLI response if present
Does NOT explain the error technically (no exit code jargon)

evals.prompt: I want to see all the details about this creator — followers, content style, emails, and whether their audience is real. URL: https://www.instagram.com/someinfluencer/
evals.expected_output: Run kol + audience for profile and audience quality; run emails separately only if user explicitly wants exported contact info
expectations: Runs easykol kol --url ... for the profile
Runs easykol audience --url ... for audience quality (fake followers, region, age/gender)
Does NOT run easykol emails unless user explicitly asks for exported email addresses
Treats email from kol profile response as the visible contact signal

evals.prompt: 我想搜一批美妆博主，同时也想知道某个具体 TikTok 账号的受众画像：https://www.tiktok.com/@beautycreator
evals.expected_output: Handle both tasks: search for the batch, audience command for the specific URL
expectations: Runs easykol search for the batch discovery (asks for region/platform if needed)
Runs easykol audience --url https://www.tiktok.com/@beautycreator for the specific account
Does NOT conflate the two tasks — handles them separately

evals.prompt: 帮我起草一封给博主的合作邀约邮件，语气专业友好，突出我们产品的卖点。
evals.expected_output: Treat as a copywriting task, not an EasyKOL CLI workflow
expectations: Does NOT invoke easykol CLI for this request
Treats the request as copywriting or content generation
Does not fabricate creator data

evals.prompt: 分析一下抖音平台最近的算法变化对内容创作者有什么影响。
evals.expected_output: Treat as a market analysis question, not an EasyKOL CLI workflow
expectations: Does NOT invoke easykol CLI
Answers the question from general knowledge or declines if outside knowledge cutoff
Does not attempt to use search or kol commands as a substitute

evals.prompt: 帮我把搜到的这些博主信息批量导入到我们公司的 Salesforce CRM。
evals.expected_output: Decline — operating external CRM systems is outside the skill's scope
expectations: Does NOT attempt to use easykol CLI for external CRM operations
Explains that integrating with external CRM is outside the skill's scope
May suggest manually exporting data from emails command as an alternative

evals.prompt: 上次搜 YouTube 健身博主的结果太少了，我想放宽条件——把最低粉丝从 50k 降到 20k，语言还是英语，地区还是美国。
evals.expected_output: Re-run search with adjusted parameters, not ask for all parameters again
expectations: Re-runs easykol search with min-subscribers=20000, keeping regions=US and languages=en
Does NOT ask the user to repeat platform and other already-stated parameters
Presents the new results as a fresh shortlist

evals.prompt: 给我对比分析这两个 YouTube 科技频道，哪个更适合合作？https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCo3m9supEHL8z2nTQaIBs6g 和 https://www.youtube.com/@mkbhd
evals.expected_output: Run kol for both URLs, optionally audience for both, and compare side by side
expectations: Runs easykol kol for both URLs
Optionally runs easykol audience for both to compare audience quality
Presents a side-by-side comparison rather than two separate reports
Offers a recommendation based on the data

evals.prompt: How much quota do I have left?
evals.expected_output: Run easykol quota and report the result in plain language
expectations: Runs easykol quota
Reports remaining credits, used credits, and daily limit in plain language
Does not expose the raw JSON

evals.prompt: Find me Instagram creators who post about sustainable fashion, based in Germany or France, with 30k–200k followers.
evals.expected_output: Run search with all inferred parameters directly
expectations: Infers platform=INSTAGRAM, regions=DE,FR, min-subscribers=30000, max-subscribers=200000
Uses sustainable fashion as the sentence
Runs search directly without asking for clarification

evals.prompt: 帮我在韩国找 KOL：AI 工具类博主、职场办公博主、还有 Study with Me 学习博主，Instagram，粉丝 1 万以上。不要加密货币相关的。
evals.expected_output: Recognize ≥2 distinct niches — run one search per niche with shared filters, then merge and dedup
expectations: Recognizes three distinct niches (AI tools, workplace/career, Study-with-Me) and runs a separate easykol search for each, not one combined sentence
Applies the same shared filters to every sub-search (platform=INSTAGRAM, regions=KR, min-subscribers=10000)
Does NOT create a search for the '不要加密货币' exclusion — treats it as a filter, not a niche
Merges and dedups results by handle / profile URL, presenting them grouped or labelled by niche
